Package org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping

@NullMarked package org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.data.relational.core
     
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping.event
     
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.conversion
     
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect
    Dialects abstract the SQL dialect of the underlying database.
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.query
    Query and update support.
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql
    Statement Builder implementation.
    org.springframework.data.relational.core.sqlgeneration
     
  • Class
    Description
    AggregatePath
    Represents a path within an aggregate starting from the aggregate root.
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfo
     
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfos
    A group of AggregatePath.ColumnInfo values referenced by there respective AggregatePath.
    AggregatePath.TableInfo
    Information about a table underlying an entity.
    AggregatePathTraversal
    Traversal methods for AggregatePath to find paths that define the ID or own the table.
    BasicRelationalPersistentProperty
    SQL-specific PersistentProperty implementation.
    Column
    The annotation to configure the mapping from an attribute to a database column.
    DefaultNamingStrategy
    The default naming strategy used by Spring Data Relational.
    Embedded
    The annotation to configure a value object as embedded in the current table.
    Embedded.Empty
    Shortcut for an empty embedded property.
    Embedded.Nullable
    Shortcut for a nullable embedded property.
    Embedded.OnEmpty
    Load strategy to be used Embedded.onEmpty().
    ForeignKeyNaming
    Enum for determining how the names of back references should get generated.
    InsertOnlyProperty
    A property with this annotation will only be written to the database during insert operations, not during updates.
    MappedCollection
    The annotation to configure the mapping for a List, Set or Map property in the database.
    NamingStrategy
    Interface and default implementation of a naming strategy.
    OptimisticLockingUtils
    Utility methods to create OptimisticLockingFailureExceptions.
    PersistentPropertyTranslator
    Utility to translate a RelationalPersistentProperty into a corresponding property from a different RelationalPersistentEntity by looking it up by name.
    RelationalMappingContext
    MappingContext implementation.
    RelationalPersistentEntity<T>
    A PersistentEntity interface with additional methods for JDBC/RDBMS related metadata.
    RelationalPersistentProperty
    A PersistentProperty with methods for additional RDBMS related metadata based on columns.
    RelationalPredicates
    Collection of relational predicates.
    Sequence
    Specify the sequence from which the value for e.g. an Id should be fetched.
    SqlIdentifierSanitizer
    Functional interface to sanitize SQL identifiers for SQL usage.
    Table
    The annotation to configure the mapping from a class to a database table.
